case_title: ARTFUL MIND INDUSTRIAL LTD. VS. THE FASHION HOUSE INC

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARTFUL MIND INDUSTRIAL LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT THE FASHION HOUSE INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
